utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final property solution:
- property: Present with selected property details and price. Includes address/description, price, bedrooms. Fully specified per label.
- financing: Present with a financing solution and terms. Includes type, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, arrangement fee. Fully specified.
- legal_services: Present with legal services and costs. Includes service description, cost, and disbursements. Fully specified.
- moving_services: Present with moving arrangements and costs. Includes service and cost. Fully specified.
- setup_services: Present with utility and setup services. Includes utilities package, initial setup cost, estimated monthly charges, and survey cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with complete cost breakdown. Includes all relevant cost lines and totals. Fully specified.
All 6 items requested are included and fully specified.
